creator: dumbbell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Oh, I wasn't aware of this, thank you!

In fact, we are experimenting with Git to work on the graphics stack ports. One of the goal is to avoid that kind of mistake with easier merges from the official Ports tree. You can read more about this here:
http://blogs.freebsdish.org/graphics/2014/10/19/migrating-xorg-dev-to-git/

For example, our experimental Git mirror has an xf86-video-ati-7.5.0 branch which has the clang fixes:
https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports-graphics/tree/xf86-video-ati-7.5.0
